prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约3387→3759→4474→8535→5763名，2024年出现明显后移（8535名），2025年大幅回升至5763名，近两年波动较大；2025年基准约5763 名；该校在贵州物理类招生计划2021年35人、2022年32人、2023年32人、2024年38人、2025年37人；2026年计划48人，较2025年扩招约29.7%，扩招幅度 较大，对竞争有一定稀释作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第42名，较2025年（45名）略有上升，在财经类院校中位居前列，层次 稳固；2023年声誉评价偏负面，主要因新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑；2026年声誉数据中未出现中央财经大学重大负面事件；抖音热度评价为"一般"，总排名 第97，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A、理论经济学获评A-，在财经类院校中处于顶尖水平；与 招生专业中的金融学类、财政学类、经济学类等高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类热度从2021年"推荐"（72.42）降至2024年"分化观望"（65.49），整体呈 降温趋势；会计/财务/审计2023-2024年回升至"推荐"；本省2026年高考总人数约29.9万，与2025年（约29.7万）基本持平，物理类考生数估算约20.8万，竞争规模稳定；省控线2 025年物理类本科批387分，较2024年380分略有上升，反映整体竞争略有加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，对贵州考生属于跨省报考；该校在贵州招生占比不高， 地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升趋势、2026年软科排名上升、省控线小幅提高等竞争加剧因素，以及2026年扩招约29.7%的稀释效应、财经类 专业热度降温等缓和因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次；预测最低位次约6741名，区间6241–7241名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3387 → 3759 → 4474 → 8535 → 5763. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (8535), and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 5763, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 5763. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Physics Category was 35 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 37 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 48, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain dilution effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, slightly up from 45th in 2025, leading among finance and economics institutions with a stable level. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the decline in the filing ranking of Journalism and Communication majors. In 2026 reputation data, no major negative events for Central University of Finance and Economics appeared. Douyin heat evaluation is 'average', with an overall ranking of 97th, medium-low short video exposure, and no obvious signal of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A, and Theoretical Economics was rated A-, at the top level among finance and economics institutions. This highly corresponds to the enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Finance/Financial/Economics majors has declined from 'Recommended' (72.42) in 2021 to 'Divergent Wait-and-See' (65.49) in 2024, showing an overall cooling trend. Accounting/Finance/Auditing rebounded to 'Recommended' in 2023-2024. The total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is about 299,000, roughly the same as 2025 (about 297,000). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 208,000, with stable competition scale. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 387 points, slightly up from 380 points in 2024, reflecting a slight intensification of overall competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is not high, so the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the slight rise in 2026 Soft Science ranking, the slight increase in provincial control line indicating intensified competition, as well as the dilution effect of about 29.7% expansion in 2026 and the cooling of finance and economics major popularity as mitigating factors, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is: predicted minimum ranking about 6741, with a range of 6241–7241.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (6241–7241), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 6200), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Finance and Accounting School. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., around 7200), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.

From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 537–639 range, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 863, a decline of about 224 places from 2024, indicating a decrease in application popularity. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou's History Category was 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 25, an increase of approximately 108% from 2025, a substantial expansion that significantly dilutes competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, leading among finance and economics institutions with a stable standing. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (declining application rankings for Journalism and Communication), but no major negative events for Central University of Finance and Economics appeared in 2026 reputation data. Douyin popularity evaluation is 'average', with no clear signal of increased application interest. Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-, highly corresponding to majors like Finance and Public Finance in History Category, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of Finance/Finance/Economics majors has shown a divergent and wait-and-see trend in recent years. The number of History Category examinees in 2025 was approximately 90,000, and in 2026 it is estimated at about 91,000, essentially flat. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 458 points, up 16 points from 442 in 2024, reflecting intensified overall competition. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Guizhou examinees, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear downward trend in 2025 rankings, the significant dilution effect of an approximately 108% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition reflected by the rising provincial control line, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1454, with a range of 1236–1672.
